outputs.description: The unique detection ID of the detection. ExtraHop.Detections.start_time The timestamp when the detection was identified.
outputs.name: ExtraHop.Detections.id

outputs.description: The timestamp when the detection was last modified. ExtraHop.Detections.end_time The timestamp when the detection was completed.
outputs.name: ExtraHop.Detections.mod_time

outputs.description: The title of the detection. ExtraHop.Detections.description The description of the event for which the detection was created.
outputs.name: ExtraHop.Detections.title

outputs.description: The categories associated with the detection. ExtraHop.Detections.risk_score The risk level of the event.
outputs.name: ExtraHop.Detections.categories

outputs.description: The detection type. ExtraHop.Detections.properties The detection properties.
outputs.name: ExtraHop.Detections.type

outputs.description: The participants involved in the event. ExtraHop.Detections.ticket_id The unique ticket ID for the detection that is being tracked.
outputs.name: ExtraHop.Detections.participants

outputs.description: The user assigned to the detection. ExtraHop.Detections.status The status of the detection.
outputs.name: ExtraHop.Detections.assignee

outputs.description: The resolution status of the detection. ExtraHop.Detections.mitre_tactics The MITRE tactics associated with the attack.
outputs.name: ExtraHop.Detections.resolution

outputs.description: The MITRE techniques associated with the attack. ExtraHop.Detections.appliance_id The unique identifier of the sensor on which the attack was detected.
outputs.name: ExtraHop.Detections.mitre_techniques

outputs.description: Indicates whether the detection is user-created.
outputs.name: ExtraHop.Detections.is_user_created
